\tzpentry{ID4765}{Quantum Connection Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4765 introduces Quantum Connection Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\Gamma = \\omega_0 \\exp\\left(-\\frac{2}{\\hbar} \\int_{x_1}^{x_2} \\sqrt{2m(V(x)-E)}dx\\right) \\otimes \\eta_{\\text{rect}}\n\\end{equation}
